message:
feat: add doctor, budget, and capabilities commands to fwc CLI

Three new command families for live diagnostics and usage analysis:

- fwc doctor --zone z:work [--connector <id>] [--self-check]
  Diagnose zone health, run connector self-checks, surface next
  actions with structured JSON output

- fwc budget [--zone z:work]
  Report live usage-budget state with enforcement status and
  per-zone summaries

- fwc capabilities {report|suggest|export} [--zone] [--connector]
  Analyze capability usage patterns and recommend least-privilege
  grants with configurable filters (all, remove-unused, review-risky)

Implementation includes new argument structures, dispatch functions
with zone validation, HostAdminClient extensions for doctor() and
budget_report(), and enhanced help text with examples.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
